subject_information.address: 230 Tiffany Mountain Suite 863, South Michael, KY 25205

suspicious_activity.narrative: Michael Stanley, DOB 1978-07-24, operational investment banker, exhibited suspicious activity from 2025-02-03 to 2025-08-01. High volume of wire transfers, including $24,082.60 on 2025-07-28 and multiple debits totaling $47,099.48 on 2025-07-29, suggests potential money laundering. Transactions occurred through accounts CUST_0062_ACC_1 and CUST_0062_ACC_3. Rapid fund movement and transaction volume are inconsistent with his profile and income of $128,868. Activity classified as money laundering due to potential layering. Filing under 31 CFR 1020.320 and 12 CFR 21.11.
suspicious_activity.ai_reasoning: STEP 1: Reviewed customer profile and account details. Noted high transaction volume and frequent wire transfers. STEP 2: Detected rapid movement of large funds, especially outgoing wire transfers on 2025-07-29 and 2025-07-28. STEP 3: Mapped to BSA/AML guidelines for suspicious activity. STEP 4: Assigned high risk due to volume and nature of transactions. STEP 5: Classified as Money Laundering due to potential layering of funds.
